description: Drop-in RMCP runtime for provider-backed MCP tools, prompts, resources, and agent capabilities.
name: dinglebear.ai/soma

environmentVariables.description: Optional deployed platform API or upstream API base URL used by the SomaClient compatibility layer. Leave unset for local provider/runtime mode.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token or upstream API key for provider-backed calls that use SomaClient. Keep secret.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for HTTP MCP bearer-auth mode. Required unless OAuth, loopback-only no-auth, or trusted-gateway auth is configured.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Container runtime data directory. The image stores config, .env, auth state, logs, and generated files here.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Entrypoint data directory before privilege drop. Keep this aligned with SOMA_HOME inside containers.
environmentVariables.name: DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Directory scanned for drop-in provider manifests and modules.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_PROVIDER_DIR

environmentVariables.description: HTTP MCP auth mode. Use bearer for static tokens or oauth for Google OAuth/JWT flows.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Disable local auth for loopback development only. Do not use for public/non-loopback deployments.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_NO_AUTH

environmentVariables.description: Trusted-gateway mode for non-loopback deployments where an upstream proxy enforces auth.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_NOAUTH

environmentVariables.description: Public URL used for OAuth issuer metadata and callbacks, for example https://soma.example.com.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_PUBLIC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID used when SOMA_MCP_AUTH_MODE=oauth.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client secret used when SOMA_MCP_AUTH_MODE=oauth.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Initial/admin Google account allowed by the OAuth flow.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind host for containerized Streamable HTTP MCP. Use 127.0.0.1 for loopback-only host installs.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind port for Streamable HTTP MCP, REST, health, status, and web fallback.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: MCP server name advertised to clients through ServerInfo.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_SERVER_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Additional accepted Host header values, comma-separated.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Additional CORS origins, comma-separated.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Rust tracing filter for logs.
environmentVariables.name: RUST_LOG

headers.description: Bearer token header for HTTP MCP bearer-auth mode.
headers.name: Authorization

environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the installed soma binary. When unset, the npm launcher runs soma from PATH.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_BIN

environmentVariables.description: Runtime data directory for local stdio/CLI runs.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Directory scanned for drop-in provider manifests and modules.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_PROVIDER_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional deployed platform API or upstream API base URL used by the SomaClient compatibility layer. Leave unset for local provider/runtime mode.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token or upstream API key for provider-backed calls that use SomaClient. Keep secret.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Rust tracing filter for local CLI and stdio MCP logs.
environmentVariables.name: RUST_LOG

headers.description: Optional bearer token for remote Soma HTTP MCP endpoints that use bearer auth.
headers.name: Authorization

api_token.description: Bearer token for the remote Soma HTTP MCP endpoint.

server_host.description: Hostname of a deployed Soma HTTP MCP endpoint.

title: Soma
